scripts.diagrams: mmdc -i diagrams/payment-orchestration.mmd -o src/assets/diagrams/payment-orchestration-light.svg -t default -b transparent && mmdc -i diagrams/payment-orchestration.mmd -o src/assets/diagrams/payment-orchestration-dark.svg -t dark -b transparent && mmdc -i diagrams/telephony-context.mmd -o src/assets/diagrams/telephony-context-light.svg -t default -b transparent && mmdc -i diagrams/telephony-context.mmd -o src/assets/diagrams/telephony-context-dark.svg -t dark -b transparent
scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:knip && npm run typecheck
